message.content:
Reviewed the failing tests. The auth module returns 401 because the session cookie is not refreshed. Here is the fix:
```python
if session.expired():
    session = refresh(session)
```
Citations: https://example.com/auth-refresh [1] [2]

No cache on this turn. Returning structured JSON:
```json
{"status": "ok", "items": 3}
```
